observations.text: The message schedules a neighborhood book club meeting at a library.
observations.quote: book club is meeting Thursday at 7pm at the library

evidence.text: No URL, payment request, or credential request appears in the paste.

inferences.text: On its face, the text resembles ordinary social coordination rather than a financial scam.

unknowns.text: Sender authenticity still was not independently verified.

confidence.rationale: Even benign-looking text is assessed without external verification.

recommended_next_steps.text: If anything feels off about the sender, confirm with Maya through another channel.
